00 00 00 00 01 00 FF FF 01 00 05 00 43 5A 6F 6E 65 98 50 C1 E1 05 11 A1 3F 9A AA A9 B7 EB 4F A7 3F 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 B1 88 61 87 31 E9 B3 3F CC C0 01 2D 5D C1 B6 3F 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 10 00 01 08 00 00 00 01 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 01 00 00 00 01 00 00 00 02 00 00 00 64 42 33 6D 28 4C 64 4D BA 66 0D 6E 60 B1 48 37 01 00 00 00 14 00 00 00 4F 42 4A 45 54 49 4E 46 4F 53 5F 43 4C 41 53 53 4E 41 4D 45 06 00 00 00 43 4F 62 44 61 6F 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 03 00 00 00 01 00 00 00 FF FF 01 00 07 00 43 43 6F 75 72 62 65 98 50 C1 E1 05 11 A1 3F 9A AA A9 B7 EB 4F A7 3F 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 B1 88 61 87 31 E9 B3 3F CC C0 01 2D 5D C1 B6 3F 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 10 00 01 08 00 00 00 01 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 01 00 00 00 01 00 00 00 02 00 00 00 82 82 EA 2B 6D 88 B1 44 9C 06 F1 28 E8 73 CB 19 01 00 00 00 14 00 00 00 4F 42 4A 45 54 49 4E 46 4F 53 5F 43 4C 41 53 53 4E 41 4D 45 06 00 00 00 43 4F 62 44 61 6F 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 03 00 00 00 01 00 00 00 FF FF 02 00 08 00 43 43 6F 6E 74 6F 75
